items.title: prompts.chat
items.summary: f.k.a. Awesome ChatGPT Prompts. Share, discover, and collect prompts from the community. Free and open source — self-host for your organization with complete privacy.
items.summary_cn: f.k.a. Awesome ChatGPT提示。分享、发现和收集社区提示。免费开源--为您的组织提供完全隐私的自助出租服务。
items.comment: Meta/Llama系又放大招，社区狂欢，不过实际部署成本您考虑过吗？

items.title: LLMs-from-scratch
items.summary: Implement a ChatGPT-like LLM in PyTorch from scratch, step by step
items.summary_cn: 在PyTorch中从头开始逐步实现类似ChatGPT的LLM
items.comment: 新模型来了，是骡子是马拉出来遛遛，别光看宣传看实测。

items.title: Visual Verification Enables Inference-time Steering and Autonomous Policy Improvement
items.title_cn: 可视化验证可实现推理时转向和自主策略改进
items.summary: Robots deployed in the real world should learn from their experience and improve over time. This requires a mechanism of practicing and learning from feedback. In this paper, we propose VERITAS, a generator-verifier framework for generalist robot policies for inference-time policy steering and self-...
items.summary_cn: 部署在现实世界中的机器人应该从他们的经验中学习，并随着时间的推移而改进。这需要一种练习和从反馈中学习的机制。在本文中，我们提出了VERITAS ，一个用于推理时间策略转向和自我推理时间策略的通用机器人策略的生成器-验证器框架。...
items.comment: 研究成果发布，理论很美好，落地才知道真假，保持审慎乐观。

items.title: ReproRepo: Scaling Reproducibility Audits with GitHub Repository Issues
items.title_cn: ReproRepo ：使用GitHub存储库问题扩展可重现性审计
items.summary: Reproducing research results from papers and released code is central to scientific progress. Existing works have introduced benchmarks to evaluate whether LLM agents can assist with reproducibility, but they are difficult to scale due to their reliance on substantial manual effort for data curation...
items.summary_cn: 从论文和发布的代码中复制研究成果是科学进步的核心。现有工作引入了基准，以评估LLM代理是否可以协助实现可重复性，但由于依赖大量手动数据管理工作，因此难以扩展...
items.comment: AI模型迭代快得飞起，但有几个真正解决了实际问题？等落地案例。

items.title: EvolveNav: Proactive Preflection and Self-Evolving Memory for Zero-Shot Object Goal Navigation
items.title_cn: EvolveNav ：用于零拍目标导航的主动偏转和自动进化内存
items.summary: Zero-Shot Object-Goal Navigation (ZS-OGN) requires embodied agents to explore and locate target objects without any prior training. To this end, recent methods leverage foundation models. But they typically rely on static priors and lack adaptation, which leads to repeated errors and costly trial an...
items.summary_cn: Zero-Shot Object-Goal Navigation （ ZS-OGN ）要求具体化的代理在没有任何事先训练的情况下探索和定位目标对象。为此，最近的方法利用了基础模型。但它们通常依赖于静态先验，缺乏适应性，这会导致重复的错误和昂贵的试验，...
items.comment: 商业模型再升级，功能看着牛，钱包要捂紧，按量付费伤不起。

items.title: AI Regulation Updates - EU AI Act Implementation
items.title_cn: 人工智能法规更新-欧盟人工智能法案实施
items.summary: European Union implements AI Act, setting global standard for AI regulation.
items.summary_cn: 欧盟实施《人工智能法案》，为人工智能监管设定全球标准。
items.comment: 新趋势值得注意，但别盲目跟风，适合自己的才是最好的。

items.title: AI Chip Market Competition Intensifies
